citations.quote: Private Accommodation Support Service ... Please contact privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk with your enquiries.
ENSA Advice ... Please contact ENSA Advice on 0131 229 8791 to arrange an appointment or email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk

findings.text: The brochure provides the email privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk for the Private Accommodation Support Service.
The brochure provides ENSA Advice contact: phone 0131 229 8791 and email ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk.
No emails, case notes, or records of Anfal's brochure provision or support service access are present in source NAP-SRC-0014.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter's email archives, case management system, or other records for any emails or case notes referencing Anfal's receipt of the Private Accommodation Brochure (NAP-SRC-0014) or contact with the Private Accommodation Support Service or ENSA Advice. Look for communications to/from privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk or ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk involving Anfal. Report any findings or confirm absence after a reasonable search.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for emails and case notes related to Anfal's brochure provision or support service access

summary: Reviewed source NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) for email and case note records regarding Anfal's brochure provision or support service access. The brochure provides contact details for the Private Accommodation Support Service (privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk) and ENSA Advice (0131 229 8791, ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk). No emails, case notes, or records of Anfal's specific interactions were found in this source. The source is a general student guide and does not contain individual case records. A follow-up task is proposed to search for emails or case notes in other sources.

uncertainties.reason: Source NAP-SRC-0014 is a general brochure; it does not contain individual case records or emails. Absence of such records in this source does not prove they do not exist elsewhere.
